task_completion.description: Verify that a Glossary named 'Student Study Strategies' was created in the BIO101 course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Glossary activity icon with the title 'Student Study Strategies' on the 'Introduction to Biology' course page, or the main page of the glossary showing this title.

task_completion.description: Verify the glossary description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Evidence-based tips for mastering biology concepts' displayed under the glossary title on the course page or within the glossary's introduction/settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Spaced Repetition' entry was added to the glossary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the concept 'Spaced Repetition' and its corresponding definition about increasing intervals of time in the glossary entries list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Active Recall' entry was added to the glossary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the concept 'Active Recall' and its corresponding definition about actively stimulating memory in the glossary entries list.

task_completion.description: Verify a block titled 'Daily Study Tip' is added to the course sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right-hand sidebar (block drawer) on the BIO101 course page for a block with the exact header/title 'Daily Study Tip'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Daily Study Tip' block is configured as a Random glossary entry block pulling from the correct glossary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Daily Study Tip' block; it should display one of the glossary entries (either 'Spaced Repetition' or 'Active Recall' and its definition), proving it is linked to the 'Student Study Strategies' glossary.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Moodle web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser navigating the Moodle UI, with visible clicks, form filling, and page loads.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the presence of the block or glossary entries.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Console tab) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM text to match the expected output.

integrity.description: Ensure the changes were made in the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard Moodle 4.5 theme (Boost or similar), with correct navigation menus, breadcrumbs, and layout, not a mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target course is 'Introduction to Biology' (shortname: BIO101). The glossary must be exactly named 'Student Study Strategies'. The two entries must be 'Spaced Repetition' and 'Active Recall'. The block must be of type 'Random glossary entry' (glossary_random) and its title must be exactly 'Daily Study Tip'.
